verdict: Seven Minerals' serum attempts to address retinol's limitations by including collagen peptides for structural support alongside retinol stimulation. However, the multi-mechanism approach dilutes ingredient concentrations, potentially reducing transformative results.

_research.name: Retinol Collagen Serum
pros: Hydrolyzed collagen peptides have better bioavailability than intact collagen
Multiple anti-aging mechanisms in single product
Strong review volume suggests satisfied users
_research.con: Multi-ingredient approach likely compromises retinol concentration for claimed efficacy.
